\tzpentry{ID4277}{Theta Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4277 introduces Theta Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
$\hat{\mathbf{n}}(\Theta,\Phi) = (\sin\Theta\cos\Phi,\ \sin\Theta\sin\Phi,\ \cos\Theta)$
\]
